umlmark.exportCurrent.title: Export Current Diagram
umlmark.exportDocument.title: Export Current File Diagrams
umlmark.exportWorkspace.title: Export Workspace Diagrams
umlmark.preview.title: Preview Current Diagram
umlmark.URLCurrent.title: Generate URL for Current Diagram
umlmark.URLDocument.title: Generate URLs for Current File Diagrams
umlmark.extractSource.title: Extract PlantUML Diagram Source from Image
umlmark.configuration.exportFormat: Export format. Leave it blank to pick format everytime you export.
umlmark.configuration.jar: Alternate plantuml.jar location. Leave it blank to use integrated jar.
umlmark.configuration.diagramsRoot: Specifies where all diagram files located (relative to workspace folder).
umlmark.configuration.fileExtensions: File extensions that find to export. Especially in workspace settings, you may add your own extensions so as to export diagrams in source code files, like ".java".
umlmark.configuration.exportSubFolder: Export diagrams to a folder which has same name with host file.
umlmark.configuration.exportIncludeFolde: Include folder heiracrchy between the root and the source diagram in the exported file path.
umlmark.configuration.exportConcurrency: Decides concurrency count when export multiple diagrams.
umlmark.configuration.exportOutDir: Exported workspace diagrams will be organized in this directory (relative path to workspace folder).
umlmark.configuration.previewAutoUpdate: Decides if automatically update the preview window.
umlmark.configuration.previewSnapIndicat: Decides if to display the snap indicators in the preview window.
umlmark.configuration.previewSwapMouseBu: Swaps left and right mouse buttons used for zooming or panning
umlmark.configuration.server: PlantUML server to generate UML diagrams on-the-fly. You may use official server https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml if you feel OK to share data with it.
umlmark.configuration.urlFormat: URL format. Leave it blank to pick format everytime you make a URL.
umlmark.configuration.urlResult: URL result type. Simple URL or ready for MarkDown use.
umlmark.configuration.render:
Select diagram render for both export and preview.
Local: Render diagrams locally in traditional way. You need to set up JAVA and GraphViz first.
PlantUMLServer: Render diagrams by server which is specified with "umlmark.server". It's much faster, but requires a server.
Local is the default configuration.
umlmark.configuration.commandArgs: commandArgs allows you add arguments to java command, such as "-DPLANTUML_LIMIT_SIZE=8192".
umlmark.configuration.jarArgs: jarArgs allows you add arguments to plantuml.jar, such as "-config plantuml.config".
umlmark.configuration.exportMapFile: Determine whether export image map (.cmapx) file when export.
umlmark.configuration.includepaths: Specifies the include paths besides source folder and the 'diagramsRoot'.
umlmark.untrusted.description: Required for loading vulnerable workspace settings
